RULING: Argued and the Court adopted its tentative ruling - DEMURRER OVERRULED IN ALL RESPECTS, 10 DAYS LEAVE TO ANSWER. Order signed in open court. (302/CWW) JUDGE: CHARLOTTE WALTER WOOLARD, REPORTER: KENT GUBBINE, CSR #5797

Off Calendar Apr-07-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT HELLER IMMIGRATION LAW GROUP LLP'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT. Appearances: Paul Heller, Defendant pro se, and as attorney for Heller Immigration Law Group, LLC, (650) 424-1900, Appearing thru CourtCall, and moving party. There are no other appearances. The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: Demurrer sustained with ten days leave to amend as to wife to plead facts showing duty. Demurrer overruled as to husband's claims. (302CWW/PB)Judge: Charlotte Walter Woolard, Reporter: Kent Gubbine, CSR 5759
